angel-investment-vc-funding.title: Startup Interested for Angel Investment and VC Funding
fields: Full Name of the Founder of Startup
Contact Number of Founder / Managing Director
Details of the co-founder and team members
Estimated project cost for Startup in Product Development?
Estimated project cost for Startup in Marketing?
Amount invested by founders in the startup till date?
What kind of facilities do you need/expect from investors?
What was the inspiration behind this idea?
Describe the innovative elements of the idea along with comparisons of prior products available?
Who are the current or future players in the market?
What are the different revenue streams for your Product/Service?
What is the cost structure of your Product/Service?
What is the expected gross margin?
Who all will be affected by your solution and what benefits do they derive?
Can you quantify the benefits? How much can you charge for the product?
What is the current stage of the product/service and what is Roadmap?
What are the key resources anticipated?
What if you are not able to get this support?
